full_text:
Zhang Chao 張超
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Chao (張超)was born in Dongping. Was a member of the anti-Dong Zhuo coalition, held out for months against Cao Cao. Zhang Chao was affiliated with Zhang Miao. Zhang Chao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
